description: You are preparing for a satellite observation and photography session at Cherry Springs State Park, PA. Create a new module named 'BrightSats' to track ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), and ISS (NAUKA) (NORAD 49044) with a layout showing Map and Polar views. Reconfigure the 'Amateur' module layout to show Map, List, and Polar views without changing its satellite list. Add a ground station for Cherry Springs State Park (41.6628 N, 77.8239 W, 700m) and configure GPredict to display all timestamps in UTC. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
